<!-- Code generated from the comments of the cpuFlagsConfig struct in builder/proxmox/common/config.go; DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY -->

- `cpu_flags` (object) - Set additional CPU flags to enable or disable specific CPU features.
  Each flag can be set to `"on"` (force enable), `"off"` (force disable), or left unset (empty string, use default).

HCL2 example:

```hcl

	cpu_flags {
	  aes          = "on"
	  pdpe1gb      = "off"
	  spec_ctrl    = "on"
	  nested_virt  = "on"
	}

```

JSON example:

```json

	"cpu_flags": {
	  "aes": "on",
	  "pdpe1gb": "off",
	  "spec_ctrl": "on",
	  "nested_virt": "on"
	}

```

<!-- End of code generated from the comments of the cpuFlagsConfig struct in builder/proxmox/common/config.go; -->
